plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize Azure OpenAI js Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Teams Agent with Data" dropdown option within the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selection popup in Visual Studio Code.
Type text: 'Customize' into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option to load your data' within the 'Teams Agent with Data' interface in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Customize" option from the dropdown list in the "Teams Agent with Data" interface of Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the "Default folder" within the "Workspace Folder" dialog in Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
